release_notes:
Alpha 4.0.10.28 - 2026-05-13 - VIES output cleanup + header rebrand
+ easter-egg time-gate + unified VAT Validation dialog. Pablo.

1. DUPLICATE VIES columns / "optional" columns leak — FIXED.
Pablo's CH15 output workbook had TWO sets of VIES columns + the
three "optional" columns despite their toggles being OFF. Root
cause: the legacy `apply_validation_to_template` POST-step was
still running in all three mixins (Single / Batch / Enhance)
AFTER `runner.apply_vies_to_workbook` already added columns inline
during `write_preliminary_review` / `enhance_vatify_file`. The
legacy post-step ignored the new toggles entirely, so it always
added all 6 columns including the deprecated `Name_Match`.
Fix:
- Removed the post-step from gui_batch_mixin, gui_enhance_mixin
and gui_single_mixin. The runner is the single authority.
- gui_single_mixin now forwards run_vies_check + every
vies_include_* + vies_recheck_until_verified into
write_preliminary_review (the post-step did this work before
and Single was the only flow that hadn't migrated).

2. VIES column headers RE-STYLED. Pablo wanted the VIES columns to
stand out from the Marosa-navy headers in the same sheet. New
dedicated style:
Fill:   #2B65E5 (cobalt blue)
Font:   Poppins 9 bold WHITE
Align:  centered (horizontal + vertical)
Format: Name_Match_Ratio cells still use "0.000".
Implemented in `runner._build_vies_header_style()`; called by
`_append_missing_vies_columns` for every newly appended header.

3. EASTER EGG fixed.
a) Time-gated: `_is_easter_egg_active_time()` returns True only
between 22:00 and 06:00 local time. Pablo flagged the egg
firing at 11:00 with the jokes pool oriented at "It is 02:14…"
— a tone mismatch.
b) Z-order / overlap: the egg now renders in its OWN thin band
BELOW the navy header (`pack(side="top", after=header)`)
instead of being .place()'d inside the navy banner. The cat
(now 22×22) and the joke text live in that band; cannot
overlap the title / subtitle / role pill anymore regardless of
header layout.

4. UNIFIED VAT Validation dialog. Pablo asked to drop the parallel
"VAT Number Validation" + "VIES Options" popups and configure
every setting in ONE compact professional window. New class
`VATValidationDialog` in `src/vat_validation_dialog.py` carries:
Sources       — EU VIES / UK HMRC + credentials button
Scope         — Also check domestic / non-EU codes
Output cols   — Request date / Consultation no. / Ratio
Reliability   — Re-check unverified + name match threshold
slider + ETA hint
Two entry points share one handler:
Output Options checkbox "Run VAT validation"  → opens dialog
"⚙ VIES Options…" button                       → opens dialog
`VatValidationConfigDialog` and `VIESOptionsDialog` are kept as
aliases of `VATValidationDialog` so external imports do not
break. `vies_options_dialog.py` is now a re-export shim.

Suite: 401 passed, 4 skipped, 9 unchanged baseline failures.
+12 new tests in tests/test_410_28_vies_fixes.py covering each fix.
